title: Rivian Q4 2024 Automotive Gross Margin Success
text: Rivian achieved positive gross margin in Q4 2024 for the first time, marking a major operational milestone. The automotive segment achieved a 7% gross margin with $110 million in gross profit. Software and services posted a 28% gross margin in Q4 2024 with $60 million in gross profit. The company accomplished a $31,000 reduction in cost of goods sold per vehicle compared to the prior year quarter. CEO RJ Scaringe stated: We've made significant progress in reducing R1's cost of goods sold by resourcing over half of the bill of materials. Automotive revenue per unit was $86,000 excluding regulatory credits. Regulatory credit revenue was nearly $300 million for Q4. Total automotive segment revenue was $1.5 billion. The achievement was driven by manufacturing optimization and product mix improvements. Higher-margin Tri-Motor offerings boosted average selling prices.
